title: Summarizing News Articles
scenario: Given a news article of approximately 300 words, write a summary of no more than 100 words that captures the main points, including key statistics, quotes, and supporting evidence.
constraints: Must include key statistics and quotes
Summary should be no more than 100 words

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary meets the word count requirement.
Verify that the summary accurately captures the main points of the article.
Check if the statistics mentioned in the summary match the ones provided in the article.
Ensure the summary supports its claims with relevant evidence from the article.
